scripts.build:android: tsc -b && vite build --mode android && npx cap sync android
scripts.build:ios: tsc -b && vite build --mode android && npx cap sync ios
scripts.android:open: bash scripts/android-java.sh npx cap open android
scripts.android:run: bash scripts/android-java.sh bash -c 'npm run build:android && npx cap run android'
scripts.android:run:bundle: bash scripts/android-java.sh bash -c 'CAPACITOR_USE_BUNDLE=true npm run build:android && CAPACITOR_USE_BUNDLE=true npx cap run android'
scripts.android:apk: bash scripts/android-java.sh bash -c 'npm run build:android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug && mkdir -p ../public/downloads && cp app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk ../public/downloads/pandamind.apk'
scripts.android:run:device: bash scripts/android-java.sh bash -c 'npm run build:android && npx cap run android --target'
